Checklist Item: Carton condition OK? (No tears, holes, crushing, deformation, or moisture damage)
Ensure there are NO forklift or handling marks
Ensure NO signs of re-taping or tampering?
Serial number label present and intact?
EPS foam (thermocol) intact? (Top, bottom, sides, and corners protected)
Ensure NO dents, scratches, crushing, or paint defects?
Lid, trays, and shelves in good condition (not broken/damaged)?
